event: Lavish still life with game, seafood, and a dog
description: A large Flemish Baroque still life depicting an abundant display of food on a table. A white swan and a peacock with its tail fanned dominate the upper portion. A red lobster on a plate, various fruits including grapes and citrus, a basket of produce, asparagus, cabbage, and other vegetables fill the scene. Below the table, a spotted hunting dog and her puppies investigate scattered items on the floor, including what appears to be game and additional produce. The composition is a celebration of material abundance in the tradition of Flemish pronkstilleven (ostentatious still life).

_meta.title: Still-Life with a Dog and Her Puppies
